name: Wheat, Wheat, Wheat #2
recipeInstructions:
50/50 FLOUR IS MADE BY HODGSON MILLS AND FOUND IN WHOLE FOODS.
1. Combine all ingredients in the order given into the bread pan, select WHITE bread, and push Start.
Note: Using 50/50 flour ensures that your whole wheat bread will be substantial, but not heavy. You'll love the crunchy texture and the nutty, whole grain taste of this bread.
Note #2: For a less crunchy loaf, soak the cracked wheat in 1/4 cup boiling water for 5 minutes. Decrease the water in the recipe to 5/8 cup.
